📘 README.md (Use This on GitHub)
💡 Diabetes Prediction using KNN
🔍 Problem

Predict whether a patient has diabetes using medical data.

⚙️ Tech Stack
Python
Scikit-learn
Pandas
Streamlit
📊 Features
Data Visualization (heatmap, pairplot)
K optimization graph
Confusion matrix
Interactive web app
🚀 Run Locally
pip install -r requirements.txt
streamlit run app.py
📈 Result

Achieved ~79% accuracy using KNN.
